subcodes.first_line: O beloved friends of ‘Abdu’l-Baha! No sooner had the Hand of divine power raised the tabernacle of everlasting glory
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز عبدالبهاء ید قدرت الهیه چون خیمه عزت ابدیه وحدت عالم انسانیرا
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @contention and conflict, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
